candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Consider the following table of $K_{sp}$ values. Which compound listed below has the greatest molar solubility in water?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
根据下表给出的$k_{sp}$值,下列哪种化合物在水中具有最大的摩尔溶解度?

a) $\mathrm{ZnCO_3}$
b) $\mathrm{CdCO_3}$ 
c) $\mathrm{CaF_2}$
d) $\mathrm{AgI}$
e) $\mathrm{Cd(OH)_2}$
